vocab.meaning: sự khao khát/đam mê không biết chán
vocab.example: As a toddler, I had an insatiable appetite for drawing, often covering every scrap of paper I could find with vibrant doodles.
My siblings and I used to spend entire afternoons immersed in make-believe worlds, pretending we were explorers in the Amazon.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác ngạc nhiên và kỳ diệu
vocab.example: Catching fireflies in the garden always filled me with a sense of wonderment that I still remember vividly today.

vocab.meaning: những trò tiêu khiển kỳ quặc và thú vị
vocab.example: Collecting peculiarly shaped stones and painting them was one of my many whimsical pastimes during the summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: leo trèo một cách khó khăn (nhưng hào hứng)
vocab.example: I was quite the tomboy and would constantly clamber up the old banyan tree behind my house to gain a better view of the neighborhood.
Looking back, playing strategy-based board games was crucial for my cognitive development and logical reasoning.

vocab.meaning: thong thả dành thời gian (làm việc gì đó nhẹ nhàng)
vocab.example: During those long, carefree summers, I would idle away the hours by the riverbank, watching the clouds drift by.

vocab.meaning: khả năng sáng tạo thiên bẩm
vocab.example: My mother always encouraged my imaginative flair by providing me with endless supplies of watercolours and canvases.
The school playground was the primary arena for our boisterous play, where we would run around until we were completely breathless.
Building intricate models out of clay holds immense nostalgic value for me, as it reminds me of the rainy days spent indoors.
